blockingIssues.description: The new `PasswordResetService.dispatchResetEmail(...)` flow issues a reset token and only later deletes sibling tokens in a separate transaction. Overlapping forgot/admin-reset requests for the same user can therefore delete each other's tokens and leave the user with delivered reset emails but no valid reset token.
blockingIssues.evidence: See `.factory/validation/auth-secret-session-hardening/scrutiny/reviews/auth-reset-recovery-contract-hardening.json` for the code-path analysis covering `issueResetToken(...)`, `cleanupSupersededResetTokens(...)`, and the missing concurrent-request coverage in the updated reset tests.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a first-class fallback when `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` fan-out fails: manually review the feature handoff/transcript skeleton plus commit diff, author the per-feature review JSONs directly, and continue synthesis instead of blocking the milestone review.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All three `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task launches for this milestone failed with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-xhigh`, so scrutiny had to complete the reviews directly in-session and author `.factory/validation/auth-secret-session-hardening/scrutiny/reviews/*.json` manually.
